creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #15)

> The ~/.xinitrc is just:

It should be
exec dbus-launch --exit-with-x11 ck-launch-session enlightenment_start

> I noticed that pcscd starts the polkit daemon on its own.

It matters not, the session should be registered within ConsoleKit for the authentication work.
